creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
On Thu, 06 Nov 2008 17:32:38 -0600, Reed A. Cartwright <reed@scit.us>  
wrote:

> Jeremy Messenger wrote:
>> Hey,
>>  I have solved it long time ago (Aug 3rd) in MarcusCom CVS ports-stable.
>>   
>> http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports-stable/www/mozplugger/  
>>   Pretty easy to patch it by:
>>  post-patch:
>>     @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|"/etc|"${PREFIX}/etc|g' \
>>         ${WRKSRC}/mozplugger.c
>>  All of that MarcusCom CVS ports-stable stuff will be merging into  
>> FreeBSD ports tree when it's complete unfreeze.
>
> Good to know that it was already solved.

I am going to add a bit more details in here for maintainer can know what  
mozplugger is doing in MarcusCom CVS ports-stable. I did all of stuff  
related with web plugin ports to create USE_WEBPLUGINS that will creating  
symlinks. I have tested all web plugin ports, so it's how I have found  
this bug and fixed while I am there. You can see more details about  
USE_WEBPLUGINS over at  
http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports-stable/www/firefox/Makefile.webplugins  
.. I have written a bit long document in there, so feel free to read and  
ask me question.

Cheers,
Mezz
